_comment: SFFMC v0.9.0+ slash commands. Auto-deployed to opencode.json `command` section. Names = kebab-case from skill filenames + sffmc_health tool wrapper. Edit here, re-run deploy script (or jq-merge manually). 13 total: 3 safety + 4 memory + 5 agentic + 1 meta-tool.

sffmc_health.template: Run the sffmc_health tool to verify SFFMC plugin health (13 diagnostic checks)
sffmc_health.description: SFFMC meta: run sffmc_health tool — 13 checks on the monorepo (hook conflicts, tests, typecheck, version, msp structure)

diagnose-tool-failure.template: Use the safety/diagnose-tool-failure skill to analyze the most recent tool error
diagnose-tool-failure.description: Safety: diagnose the last tool failure (analyzes error context, suggests fix)

manage-auto-max.template: Use the safety/manage-auto-max skill to configure max-mode auto-trigger threshold
manage-auto-max.description: Safety: configure auto-max threshold (when to auto-enable max-mode reasoning)

write-rule.template: Use the safety/write-rule skill to add a new safety rule for blocking tool calls
write-rule.description: Safety: write a new rule to the safety/rules registry

checkpoint-save.template: Use the memory/checkpoint-save skill to create a memory checkpoint of the current session state
checkpoint-save.description: Memory: save a checkpoint snapshot (extra_checkpoint) for later restore

dream-cleanup.template: Use the memory/dream-cleanup skill to consolidate and prune stale memories
dream-cleanup.description: Memory: trigger dream consolidation (extra_dream) — pattern detection + decay

judge-output.template: Use the memory/judge-output skill to evaluate the most recent model output for quality/correctness
judge-output.description: Memory: judge the last output (extra_judge) — score + rationale

recall.template: Use the memory/recall skill to search past context for relevant information
recall.description: Memory: recall — semantic search across past sessions/decisions

compose-skill.template: Use the agentic/compose-skill skill to compose a new SFFMC skill from a template
compose-skill.description: Agentic: compose a new skill (uses compose_skill tool to scaffold from a description)

health-check.template: Use the agentic/health-check skill to run health checks on the SFFMC monorepo
health-check.description: Agentic: run health-check skill — interactive guided version of sffmc_health tool

resolve-hook-conflict.template: Use the agentic/resolve-hook-conflict skill to resolve a hook conflict between plugins
resolve-hook-conflict.description: Agentic: diagnose and fix a hook conflict (2+ plugins registering same hook key)

run-max-mode.template: Use the agentic/run-max-mode skill to enable max-mode reasoning for the current task
run-max-mode.description: Agentic: enable max-mode (extended thinking + larger context window)

run-workflow.template: Use the agentic/run-workflow skill to run a defined multi-step workflow
run-workflow.description: Agentic: run a workflow (workflow tool) — execute a YAML-defined pipeline of steps
